description: Live run-tool E2E tool list for the Beehave Tools extension. Driven by tests/e2e/run_tool_e2e.py from the e2e-godot CI leg against a connected headless editor (with the third-party Beehave addon installed by the ADDON_* CI step) + a local gamedev-mcp-server. Each entry is one real assertion: a regression in the tool turns the CI leg red.
notes: beehave-defaults is pure-managed (no scene, no addon). The editor tools resolve nodes relative to EditorInterface.GetEditedSceneRoot(), so the 'setup' phase opens a scene first via the core godot_mcp 'scene-create' tool, then the tools scaffold a tree under it. Beehave is a Class-B addon: every editor tool is presence-gated and the happy path asserts "Installed":true (PascalCase — ReflectorNet serializes C# property names PascalCase). 'expect' substrings are matched against godot-cli's compact --raw JSON. ClassName is the Beehave class_name we instantiated (NOT node.GetClass(), which returns the native base 'Node' for a GDScript class_name node).
